redemption.note: Redemption basis is unclear — verify with issuer legal counsel.

liability.note: Segregated-reserve structure is characteristic of a reserve-backed stablecoin (e.g. MiCA EMT), not a bank deposit.

eligibility.note: Open / unrestricted holders — not consistent with a bank deposit token; assess as e-money token or stablecoin.

insurance.note: No deposit insurance — verify regulatory treatment and investor disclosure.

output_payload.applicable_regime: Other: Verify applicable central-bank, deposit-insurance, and e-money/stablecoin legislation in this jurisdiction.
output_payload.capital_accounting_note: Classification unclear or misidentified — capital and accounting treatment depends on reclassification result. Stablecoin/EMT = MiCA Art. 48+ regime (EU) or GENIUS Act (US). Verify with current guidance.

remediation_checklist.issue: Redemption basis is unclear — verify with issuer legal counsel.
remediation_checklist.action: Confirm at-par-on-demand redemption with issuer legal counsel.

remediation_checklist.issue: Segregated-reserve structure is characteristic of a reserve-backed stablecoin (e.g. MiCA EMT), not a bank deposit.
remediation_checklist.action: Confirm on-balance-sheet classification with issuer. If segregated-reserve: token is a stablecoin/EMT, not a deposit.

remediation_checklist.issue: Open / unrestricted holders — not consistent with a bank deposit token; assess as e-money token or stablecoin.
remediation_checklist.action: Restrict token holders to allowlisted wholesale counterparties or recategorise as EMT.

output_payload.status_asof: 2026-06-20 — verify US deposit law, MiCA EMT Arts. 48+, UK RLN model, and FDIC/FCA/EBA guidance against current primary sources
output_payload.note: Educational deposit-token compliance validator. A deposit token is a bank liability, NOT a reserve-backed e-money instrument. Distinct from Wave 8 Canton tokenized-asset layer and from Tempo/Arc stablecoin tools. Not legal, capital, or accounting advice.
